title: the fsl-org repository migration
manager: The repositories reorganize under the `fsl` GitHub org secured back in 2026 — repo moves, redirect hygiene, and satellite-repo creation, at which point the long-pending SAT twins (the highlighter and editor satellite issues) can finally close. This is the operational move that has been load-bearing since the era program began: the org is where the fleet's satellite repos live, and this is when the transfer's promise is finally cashed in.
cs: org migration = repo moves + redirect hygiene + satellite creation (SAT twins finally close); the fsl-org transfer secured 2026-07-04 (90-day window); John's operational action; load-bearing for the fleet's satellite repos.
